rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>哎呀，是之前破坏矿床的旅行者！<unk[5:0]>

呵呵，你当时那一击那么精彩，
我怎么可能忘记你呢。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>啊，是那位破壞了礦床的旅行者！<unk[5:0]>

呵呵，我當然記得喔，
你那一擊真的是令人印象深刻啊。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>あら <Ruby={4:10}こうしょう>鉱床を<Ruby={2:4}こわ>壊した<Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人さん！<unk[5:0]>

ふふ モチロン<Ruby={2:4}おぼ>覚えてるわよ
あなたの<Ruby={4:8}いちげき>一撃 <Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に<Ruby={4:6}みごと>見事だったもの
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>Oh, you're the traveler who destroyed
that ore deposit!<unk[5:0]>

Hee-hee, of course I remember you. Who
could forget a strike THAT impressive?

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Huh. Maybe I'll try building a weapon like
yours for myself!

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Maybe I should try making a weapon like
the one you used to have...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]>可是我……<unk[5:0]>动手能力太差了……<unk[5:1]>
而且，装上去以后<Color=red>想再拆下来就很麻烦<Color=white>吧？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]>不過……<unk[5:0]>我不擅長這種作業啊……<unk[5:1]>
而且一旦裝上去，<Color=red>拆掉時會很麻煩<Color=white>吧？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]>でも<Ruby={2:6}わたし>私 <Ruby={8:14}こうさくにがて>工作苦手なのよね…<unk[5:0]>
それに <Ruby={4:6}いちど>一度くっつけたら<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}はず>外すの<Ruby={4:8}たいへん>大変<Color=white>じゃない？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]>But I'm kinda...<unk[5:0]>bad at that crafty stuff.<unk[5:1]>
Plus, isn't it <Color=red>hard to remove something<Color=white>
once you've attached it?

rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:8}たいへん>大変
rows.USen: It is hard.

rows.JPja: そんなことない
rows.USen: Not really.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:8}たいへん>大変そうよね…<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:4}むり>無理に<Ruby={2:4}はず>外そうとして<Ruby={2:4}こわ>壊れても<Ruby={2:4}こま>困るし
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>Right? I figured it'd be.<unk[5:0]> And I'd be really
annoyed if I broke something while trying
to remove it...

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>For real? That's surprising.<unk[5:0]> I think it'd be
pretty tough for me...<unk[5:0]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:261]>啊，说起来，<unk[5:0]>

我听说位于这里东方的<Color=red>一始村<Color=white>
有一家<Color=red>分解店<Color=white>。
那里的人能靠专业技术
把组装起来的东西完好地复原。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:261]>啊，話說回來。<unk[5:0]>

我聽說東方的<Color=red>一始村<Color=white>裡
有一間<Color=red>分解店<Color=white>。
店內工匠會用精湛的分解技術，
幫人把東西漂亮地恢復成裝上前的狀態喔。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:261]>ああ そういえば<unk[5:0]> 

ここから<Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東の<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方にある <Color=red>イチカラ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>に
<Color=red><Ruby={6:10}ぶんかいや>分解屋さん<Color=white>がいるって<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いたことあるわ
<Ruby={6:14}しょくにんわざ>職人技で くっつけたものを
キレイに<Ruby={2:4}もと>元に<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻してくれるらしいわよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:261]>Oh, but that's right!<unk[5:0]>


There's a shop called <Color=red>Break-a-Part<Color=white> in
Tarrey Town! That's just east of here.

They can apparently use their master
craftsmanship to detach anything from
anything! Like they were never attached!

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>啊，抱歉。<unk[5:0]>
我剛才稍微打了個瞌睡。
<unk[3:0:268]>你拿著一把我從沒見過的武器呢。<unk[5:0]>
那是你自己製作的嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>あ ごめん<unk[5:0]>
ちょっとウトウトしてたわ
<unk[3:0:268]>あなた いつも<Ruby={2:2}み>見たことない<Ruby={6:6}ぶきも>武器持ってるわね<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分で<Ruby={2:4}つく>作ってるの？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Ah, sorry.<unk[5:0]> Just sort of dozed off there.


<unk[3:0:268]>You always have weapons that I've never
seen before.<unk[5:0]> Like that one there! Did you
make it yourself?

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}つく>作った
rows.USen: I made it.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}ひろ>拾った
rows.USen: I found it.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>你手艺不错嘛。<unk[5:0]>
我也试着做做看吧，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>Wow. You're good at making things!<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:258]>Yeah! I'll work hard and make a weapon to
